scripts.dev: pnpm run env:setup && concurrently -n "api,web,shared,const" -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter @tbms/shared-types dev" "pnpm --filter @tbms/shared-constants dev"
scripts.build:do:web: pnpm --filter @tbms/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @tbms/shared-constants build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.build:do:api: pnpm --filter @tbms/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @tbms/shared-constants build && pnpm --filter api exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:status: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate status
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:migrate:reset: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate reset
scripts.prisma:db:push: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db push
scripts.prisma:seed: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:seed:list: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed -- --list
